title: SirEdvin's Cloud Solutions
description: CC:T addons that brings some cloud services from real world into minecraft
body:
Tired of too bare metal world of CC:T? What your own database to be reliable no matter what? What some block draw charts for you? Then get ready for SirEdvin's Cloud solutions, mod that designed to provide you with all this crap:

- Open yourself to a bunch of cross-dimensional cloud databases: [Key-value](https://docs.siredvin.site/CloudSolutions/kv_storage/)
- Ask server owners to configure [StatsD bridge](https://docs.siredvin.site/CloudSolutions/statsd_bridge/) and send metrics from your computers to real worlds  
- And much more to come, if you have ideas, please, open an [issue](https://github.com/SirEdvin/CloudSolutions/issues/new)
